items.title: Don’t care about the latest model? Logitech’s MX Master 2S Ergonomic Bluetooth mouse is down to just $52
items.summary:
We’re now tracking a deal at Target that drops Logitech’s MX Master 2S ergonomic Bluetooth wireless mouse down to $52.49 shipped. The mouse has been hovering closer to $70 lately, so this deal takes roughly 25% off its usual going rate and lands it among the lowest prices we’ve tracked for it. This model briefly dropped to this price last month at Amazon before selling out, and today’s offer marks the return of that in case you missed it last time. Discounts on this model haven’t been popping up as often recently, and it’s now sitting within about $2 of its best price from last year. It’s a solid option if you want to try an MX Master mouse without spending a ton, so be sure to check out more details below.

more…

This is one of the newest additions to Logitech’s G series keyboards that hit the scene towards the end of last year carrying a $170 price tag. This has only been discounted once before today since its debut when it hit the $161 mark earlier this year, but today’s deal marks its steepest price drop to date at $40 off. This is the lowest price we tracked for this wired model, so be sure to snag it now if you’re in the market to buy a new gaming keyboard for your battlestation. Head below for more details.

items.summary:
Today only, as part of its Deals of the Day offers, Best Buy has listed Samsung’s Odyssey 49-inch curved gaming monitor down at $749.99 shipped. This particular model has fetched as much as $1,300 recently at Amazon, where it is currently going for $900. Best Buy’s offer today takes a solid $550 off its usual going rate to mark one of the lowest prices we have tracked for it to date. This display dropped to $680 just ahead of Black Friday last year, and it’s now within just $70 of that all-time low. While this may not be the newest ultrawide model in Samsung’s Odyssey lineup, it remains a solid pick for folks looking to upgrade their battlestation, and it’s a lot easier on your wallet right now as well. In an email to employees, Johny Srouji details newly combined hardware engineering and hardware technologies division, organized across five key areas  —  Apple Inc.'s newly combined hardware engineering and hardware technologies division will be organized across five key areas, its new leader told staffers on Monday.

items.title: Apple says Tim Cook, as executive chairman, "will assist with certain aspects of the company, including engaging with policymakers around the world" (Marcus Mendes/9to5Mac)

Marcus Mendes / 9to5Mac:
Apple says Tim Cook, as executive chairman, “will assist with certain aspects of the company, including engaging with policymakers around the world”  —  Apple confirmed today that although Tim Cook will be leaving the role of Apple CEO come September, he'll still be involved in a key area of the company.

items.title: Tim Cook will still be Apple’s Trump whisperer

"As executive chairman, Cook will assist with certain aspects of the company, including engaging with policymakers around the world," Apple writes in a press […]

items.title: Tim Cook to step down as Apple CEO after 15 years, John Ternus named successor
items.summary: Apple has announced a major leadership transition, with Chief Executive Officer (CEO) Tim Cook set to become Executive Chairman effective 1 September 2026. items.title: Tim Cook stepping down as Apple CEO, John Ternus taking over
items.summary: The transition has been expected for some time and ends one of the longer and more impactful runs a CEO has had at any company. Cook had inherited a company that many industry watchers and enthusiasts struggled to separate from its famed founder. What he leaves behind is a $4 trillion business with annual revenue that has more than quadrupled on his watch.
